Business Name: Truck Parking Club - Pence Ln lot behind Workman's Travel Center
Petro Stopping Center #326 (Petro N. Little Rock)
Description: Large TA/Petro travel center at the Galloway/Protho Junction cluster, I-40 Exit 161. Approx. 250 truck parking spaces with Reserve-It reserved parking, 10 diesel lanes, 14 showers, Iron Skillet restaurant, laundry, CAT scale, trucker lounge, CB shop, and on-site TA Truck Service shop. Open 24 hours.

Pilot travel center at I-40 Exit 161 (Galloway Rd), part of the Protho Junction truck-stop cluster. About 100 truck parking spaces including 24 reserved/paid Prime Parking spots, 7 showers (reservable via the Pilot app), 11 fuel lanes, CAT scale, and convenience store food. Open 24 hours.

Love's travel stop at I-40 Exit 161 in the Galloway/Protho Junction cluster. Approx. 65 truck parking spaces, 5 showers, 8 fuel lanes, CAT scale, bulk DEF, laundry, WiFi, and food options including Chester's Fried Chicken and Godfather's Pizza. Speedco truck care is adjacent. Open 24 hours.

Circle K/Valero fuel stop and convenience store at I-40 Exit 175 in Lonoke (formerly a Cracker Box/Flash Market travel center). Truck diesel with satellite pumps and roughly 28 truck parking spots, ATM, paved lot, and WiFi. No showers or service bays listed. Open 24 hours.

Business Name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of Little Rock
Description: Blue Beacon exterior truck and trailer wash at I-40 Exit 161, located in the Galloway/Protho Junction truck-stop cluster next to the Petro and Pilot. Open 24 hours.

Business Name: TA Truck Service #326 (at Petro N. Little Rock)
Description: Fixed TA Truck Service shop at the Petro Stopping Center, I-40 Exit 161. Six service bays with tires, brakes, electrical, DOT inspections, alignments, HVAC, aftertreatment, and advanced diagnostics. Open 24 hours; Bridgestone/Michelin commercial tire dealer.

Speedco (Love's Truck Care) fixed shop at I-40 Exit 161 offering commercial truck tires, oil/lube service, and light mechanical work. Michelin commercial tire dealer, adjacent to the Love's Travel Stop in the Galloway cluster.
Commercial truck tire dealer and service shop on Valentine Rd at I-40 Exit 161. Bridgestone/Firestone commercial dealer serving trucks and trailers. Hours: Mon-Fri 7:30am-5pm, Sat 8am-12pm.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Petro Stopping Center #326
Description: Certified CAT scale located at the Petro Stopping Center, I-40 Exit 161, North Little Rock. Available 24 hours with the travel center.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Pilot Travel Center #332
Description: Certified CAT scale at the Pilot Travel Center, I-40 Exit 161 (Galloway Rd), North Little Rock. Available 24 hours with the travel center.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Love's Travel Stop #236
Description: Certified CAT scale at the Love's Travel Stop, I-40 Exit 161, North Little Rock. Available 24 hours with the travel stop.

Independent trucker-oriented motel at I-40 Exit 161, next door to the Pilot Travel Center and Blue Beacon truck wash in the Galloway cluster. Big-rig parking on site and a discounted rate for CDL holders; rooms with microwave and refrigerator, free WiFi.

Budget motel at I-40 Exit 175 in Lonoke with explicitly advertised free truck, bus, and RV parking (large-vehicle outdoor lot). Free continental breakfast, outdoor pool, pet friendly. Near the Exit 175 fuel stops.

Listed in fuel directories as a truck-parking fuel stop at I-40 Exit 157 (Hwy 161), but current operation/branding could not be confirmed; nearby listings at 2500-2511 Hwy 161 show Alon and Prothro Superstop branding, suggesting the site may have been rebranded or closed.

Business Name: Holiday Inn Express & Suites Lonoke I-40 (Exit 175)
Description: Hotel at I-40 Exit 175, Lonoke. One booking site (HotelPlanner) states bus and truck parking is available, but the IHG official page does not explicitly confirm truck parking.
Motel described by one booking site as off I-40 near Exit 153A with free parking including room for semi-trucks.
Large Love's Travel Stop opened June 2022 at I-40 Exit 57 with 114 truck parking spaces, 10 showers, CAT scale, laundry, dog park, and on-site Speedco truck care.
24-hour Pilot Travel Center at I-40 Exit 84 with 130 truck parking spaces, 7 diesel lanes, 5 showers, Subway and Wendy's, CAT scale, laundry, and WiFi.
24-hour Flying J Travel Center at I-40 Exit 84 with 175 truck parking spots (15 reserved), 10 fuel lanes, 15 showers, Denny's restaurant, and CAT scale.
Independent Exxon Tiger Mart auto/truck center at I-40 Exit 55 (US-64 W) with truck parking, restaurant/deli, store, and showers; open 24 hours.
